query.query_string: Trifluridine AND benign neoplasm of cecum

data.query: Trifluridine AND benign neoplasm of cecum

results.title: Prognostic Value of TACE With Irinotecan-loaded Drug-eluting Beads (DEBIRI) in Patients With Liver Metastases from Unresectable Colorectal Cancer.
results.abstract: The standard of care for patients with colorectal cancer and liver metastases, who fail to respond to systemic chemotherapy has not yet been established. Therefore, we investigated the prognostic value of transarterial chemoembolization (TACE) using irinotecan-loaded drug-eluting beads (DEBIRI) in treating liver metastases due to colorectal cancer.
